---
title: "ecology_data_exploration"
output: pdf_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, eval = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r load-packages, eval = TRUE}
#load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(Matrix)
library(MASS)
library(Rcpp)
library(RcppArmadillo)
library(nloptr)
library(numDeriv)
library(PLNmodels)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r load-data}
all_taxa_df <- read.csv("Datasets/TREAM_allTaxa.csv")
sitelevel_df <- read.csv("Datasets/TREAM_siteLevel.csv")
siteyearlevel_df <- read.csv("Datasets/TREAM_siteYearLevel.csv")
```
